port_metadata.vessel_dimension_source: International conventions on tonnage (G.T.) with legally established corrections

calculation_logic.application_basis: Tariffs are applied per maneuver, regardless of the number of tugs used (unless specifically noted for hourly services).

monobuoy.description: Specific offshore mooring facility for tankers

monobuoy_maneuvers.description: Berth and unberth services at Monobuoy

specific_services_and_surcharges.name: Shifting and Internal Movements
specific_services_and_surcharges.applied_to: Total applicable tariff for the maneuver

specific_services_and_surcharges.name: Dead Ship / Engines Not Running
specific_services_and_surcharges.condition: Services rendered to vessels whose engines are not running

specific_services_and_surcharges.name: Service Cancellation
specific_services_and_surcharges.condition: Request cancelled after the tugboat has departed from its base

delay_logic.description: Delays attributable to the vessel during service provision beyond usual estimated maneuver times.
delay_logic.surcharge_type: Penalty equal to the maximum applicable tariff

time_measurement.start: Moment tugboat is positioned to begin maneuver (alongside or intervention point)
time_measurement.end: Moment order is issued by competent authority declaring operation complete

relevant_subtext.official_language: Original text in Spanish takes precedence over English translation in case of disputes.
